overview.value: The Exploration Company was founded in 2021 by Hélène Huby and a team of aerospace veterans who had worked on some of the most complex global space programs. The company operates out of Germany, France, Luxembourg, Spain and Italy, with offices in the United States and the United Arab Emirates. It builds space vehicles, including a reusable capsule called Nyx and a high-thrust rocket engine called Storm.

focus.value: Space vehicles, including the reusable Nyx capsule and the Storm rocket engine
